description: You are a developer on the 'TreatmentPlanner' system. You need access to a shared directory of treatment protocols located at '/opt/hospital/protocols' for a file listing feature, but you are not allowed to copy these files into the workspace due to compliance rules. Create a linked folder named 'protocols' in the 'TreatmentPlanner' project root that points to '/opt/hospital/protocols'. Implement a Java class 'com.hospital.planning.ProtocolIndexer' that lists the names of all files in the 'protocols' folder (using the relative path "protocols") and writes them to 'protocol_index.txt' in the project root. Run the class to generate the index file.
